svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(168, 218, 220), rgb(25, 68, 70)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(69, 123, 157), rgb(100, 147, 176));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 98px; height: 1px; padding-top: 21px; margin-left: 110px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1D3557;

div.div:
Initial state is 'DCC Power On'.
DCC Power off is possibly start of cut-out.
Loop continues if Power off <= 44 µs.
Channel 1 Window starts at 46 µs.
